title: UrbanForma
description: This mod introduces a variety of decorative blocks, including diverse road elements and building blocks in multiple colors.
body:
This mod introduces a variety of decorative blocks, including diverse road elements and building blocks in multiple colors. It is designed with a focus on creative city-building, and therefore is not intended for survival mode gameplay. Please note that the English translation is currently incomplete. The mod's content is expected to continue expanding in the future.

2025/12/25---In the future, the focus of module development will shift to updating whichever blocks I am missing during the building process.
